message: 🌱 Add argo: Support for DeleteNamespace SyncPolicy mission (#487)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-4435-support-for-deletenamespace-syncpolicy",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo: Support for DeleteNamespace SyncPolicy",
+    "description": "Support for DeleteNamespace SyncPolicy. Requested by 95+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
helm list -n argo 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Namespace configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo resources:
```bash
kubectl get namespace -A
kubectl describe namespace <name> -n argo
```
Adding support for some mechanism to allow ArgoCD to delete the namespace of its underlying app. This could be limited to apps that were created with a `CreateNamespace` SyncPolicy set."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for DeleteNamespace SyncPolicy",
+        "description": "- After this PR is merged, we can specify `DeleteNamespace` syncOption, which enables a feature to delete an auto-created namespace.
- We can delete a namespace only when:
  - `CreateNamespace=true` and `DeleteNamespace=true`
  - The target namespace is tracked by an application. 
    - e.g.) The
```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: guestbook
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  project: default
  destination:
    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc/
    namespace: test
  source:
    repoURL: https://github.com/argoproj/argocd-example-apps.git
    path: guestbook
    targetRevision: HEAD
  syncPolicy:
    syncOptions:
    - CreateNamespace=true
    - DeleteNamespace=true
    managedNamespaceMetadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: guestbook
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support for DeleteNamespace SyncPolicy" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- After this PR is merged, we can specify `DeleteNamespace` syncOption, which enables a feature to delete an auto-created namespace.
- We can delete a namespace only when:
  - `CreateNamespace=true` and `DeleteNamespace=true`
  - The target namespace is tracked by an application. 
    - e.g.) The namespace must have a label, `app.kubernetes.io/instance=${applicationName}`",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: guestbook
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  project: default
  destination:
    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc/
    namespace: test
  source:
    repoURL: https://github.com/argoproj/argocd-example-apps.git
    path: guestbook
    targetRevision: HEAD
  syncPolicy:
    syncOptions:
    - CreateNamespace=true
    - DeleteNamespace=true
    managedNamespaceMetadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: guestbook",
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: guestbook
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  project: default
  destination:
    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
    namespace: test
  source:
    repoURL: https://github.com/argoproj/argocd-example-apps.git
    path: guestbook
    targetRevision: HEAD
  syncPolicy:
    syncOptions:
    - CreateNamespace=true
    - DeleteNamespace=true
    managedNamespaceMetadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: guestbook"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/pull/11821"
+    },
